name: Glazed Corrned Beef
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds corned beef (up to 4 lbs), preferably round or rump cut
3 tablespoons frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
Combine all ingredients except corned beef and glaze in a Crock-Pot. Add corned beef with the fat side up. Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 12 hours or until fork tender, or cook on High for 5 to 6 hours. Remove meat from broth. Score the top of the corned beef in diamond shapes. Insert additional cloves to decorate if desired.
About 30 minutes before serving, place corned beef on a heatproof platter. Prepare glaze and spoon over corned beef. Bake in a 375 degree F. oven for 20 to 30 minutes, basting occasionally with glaze.
